case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. VS. DORRIAN LEWIS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN $786.81 PRINCIPAL, $268.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,055.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035147)
DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033, 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100035147) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030500), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. SERVED JAN-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $268.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100035147) AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100031421), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. SERVED NOV-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100103169) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100060983): GOODMAN, JOHN M SUBSTITUTED FOR HONG, ANGIE C AS ATTORNEY FOR JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DORRIAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-08-2018
